subcodes.first_line: I call upon Thee, O my God, supplicating before the Kingdom of Thy Divinity, humbly beseeching the Dominion of Thy mercy, clinging to the hem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انادیک یا الهی مبتهلا الی ملکوت الوهیتک متضرعا الی جبروت رحمانیتک متشبثا بذیل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
